title: MCA § 1-1-101 - Definition of law
text:
1-1-101. Definition of law. "Law" is a solemn expression of the will of the supreme power of the state.

History: History: En. Sec. 5150, Pol. C. 1895; re-en. Sec. 3550, Rev. C. 1907; re-en. Sec. 5670, R.C.M. 1921; Cal. Pol. C. Sec. 4466; re-en. Sec. 5670, R.C.M. 1935; R.C.M. 1947, 12-101.
